scripts.test:stable: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:stable:ci: npm run test:contracts:ci && npm run test:smoke:ci
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:smoke:hooks && npm run test:smoke:ui
scripts.test:smoke:ui: npm run test:smoke:ui:surfaces && npm run test:smoke:ui:truth && npm run test:smoke:ui:rest
scripts.test:smoke:ui:surfaces: vitest run --configLoader runner --config vitest.smoke-ui.config.js src/test/App.smoke.test.jsx src/test/components/layout/Sidebar.test.jsx src/test/surfaces/workspace/WorkspacePage.smoke.test.jsx src/test/pages/Inbox.test.jsx src/test/pages/Publish.test.jsx
scripts.test:smoke:ui:rest: vitest run --configLoader runner --config vitest.smoke-ui.config.js src/test/components/feedback/SurfaceBanner.test.jsx src/test/components/admin/ProviderSecretsPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/admin/AdminPageShell.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxComposer.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxThreadListPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxDetailPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxLeadPanel.test.jsx src/test/pages/AdminTenants.test.jsx src/test/pages/AdminTeam.test.jsx src/test/pages/ChannelCatalog.test.jsx src/test/pages/Executions.smoke.test.jsx src/test/pages/Voice.test.jsx src/test/pages/Comments.test.jsx src/test/pages/Inbox.test.jsx
scripts.test:smoke:ci: npm run test:smoke:hooks:ci && npm run test:smoke:ui:ci
scripts.test:smoke:ui:ci: npm run test:smoke:ui:ci:surfaces && npm run test:smoke:ui:ci:truth && npm run test:smoke:ui:ci:rest
scripts.test:smoke:ui:ci:surfaces: vitest run --configLoader runner --config vitest.smoke-ui.config.js src/test/App.smoke.test.jsx src/test/components/layout/Sidebar.test.jsx src/test/surfaces/workspace/WorkspacePage.smoke.test.jsx src/test/pages/Inbox.test.jsx src/test/pages/Publish.test.jsx --reporter=default --reporter=junit --reporter=json --outputFile.junit=./test-results/frontend-smoke-ui-surfaces.junit.xml --outputFile.json=./test-results/frontend-smoke-ui-surfaces.json
scripts.test:smoke:ui:ci:rest: vitest run --configLoader runner --config vitest.smoke-ui.config.js src/test/components/feedback/SurfaceBanner.test.jsx src/test/components/admin/ProviderSecretsPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/admin/AdminPageShell.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxComposer.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxThreadListPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxDetailPanel.test.jsx src/test/components/inbox/InboxLeadPanel.test.jsx src/test/pages/AdminTenants.test.jsx src/test/pages/AdminTeam.test.jsx src/test/pages/ChannelCatalog.test.jsx src/test/pages/Executions.smoke.test.jsx src/test/pages/Voice.test.jsx src/test/pages/Comments.test.jsx src/test/pages/Inbox.test.jsx --reporter=default --reporter=junit --reporter=json --outputFile.junit=./test-results/frontend-smoke-ui-rest.junit.xml --outputFile.json=./test-results/frontend-smoke-ui-rest.json
scripts.lint: node ../scripts/check-js-syntax.mjs src public vite.config.js eslint.config.js postcss.config.js tailwind.config.js
